title: British Midland Virtual Website Now Live
summary: The official British Midland Virtual website is now live.
content: We're delighted to officially launch the British Midland Virtual website.

After months of planning and development, the new website brings together everything pilots need to discover British Midland Virtual, explore our growing fleet, view our expanding route network and stay up to date with the latest news from across the airline.

Designed around the heritage of British Midland, the website combines a modern experience with classic airline styling. From fleet information and interactive route maps to future operational resources, this marks the beginning of an exciting new chapter for the airline.

Although today's launch represents an important milestone, development is far from complete. Over the coming weeks we will continue expanding the website with our Operations Centre, pilot resources, comprehensive documentation and additional community features.

As our network continues to grow from Birmingham, we look forward to welcoming new pilots who share our passion for realistic airline operations and the history of one of Britain's most recognisable airlines.

We would like to thank everyone who has supported the project throughout development. Your enthusiasm and feedback have helped shape the airline we are proud to launch today, and we look forward to welcoming you aboard.
author: British Midland Crew Services

title: Paris Charles de Gaulle Joins the Network
summary: British Midland Virtual continues its European expansion with the addition of Paris Charles de Gaulle.
content: British Midland Virtual is pleased to announce the addition of Paris Charles de Gaulle (CDG) to our growing European network.

As one of Europe's busiest and most significant aviation hubs, Paris Charles de Gaulle offers pilots a rewarding Airbus A320 operation from our Birmingham base while strengthening our presence across Western Europe.
The route has been selected to reflect the spirit of British Midland's historic European operations while providing realistic schedules and enjoyable flights within Microsoft Flight Simulator.
Paris joins an expanding network that already includes Amsterdam, Dublin, Brussels, Frankfurt, Düsseldorf, Copenhagen, Zurich and Milan, providing even greater choice for our pilots.

Network development remains a key focus for the airline, with additional European destinations, seasonal leisure routes and long-haul services already in planning as we continue connecting Birmingham with the world.
author: Network Planning

title: Airbus A320 Fleet Ready for Operations
summary: Our flagship Airbus A320 fleet is now fully configured for launch operations.
content: Following extensive work behind the scenes, the British Midland Virtual Airbus A320 fleet is now fully prepared for day one operations.

Each aircraft has been configured to provide a consistent experience for our pilots, featuring custom liveries inspired by the final British Midland colour scheme while embracing a modern interpretation suitable for today's virtual skies.
The Airbus A320 will form the backbone of our European operation, serving destinations across Western and Central Europe from Birmingham Airport.
As the airline grows, additional aircraft including the Airbus A321 and Airbus A350-1000 will expand our capability into longer routes and higher-capacity operations.
author: Fleet Management

title: Pilot Applications Opening Soon
summary: Applications to join British Midland Virtual will open shortly.
content: Preparations are underway to welcome our first generation of British Midland Virtual pilots.
The upcoming Join section of the website will guide new members through the application process and introduce the airline's philosophy, standards and operating procedures.

Whether you are a seasoned virtual airline pilot or just beginning your journey in Microsoft Flight Simulator, British Midland Virtual aims to provide a welcoming and enjoyable environment focused on realism without unnecessary complexity.
More information regarding pilot recruitment, ranks and future events will be announced in the coming weeks.
author: Community Team
